TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ikasumamadan yucaayhen ka tayni ku midebungay nu tademaw, tadaw mi sakakuway ku nikaudiip nu sakidaya, hanca inayi' ku mikueanay i totaan, u tumuk dada' ku tatengilan nu nyadu', kapah kuni kalaluung nu binawlan, inayi' kulatusay a tademaw, mi tengil amin tu kamu nu tumuk, cacay ku kamu nutumuuk cacay ku kawaw nu binawlan, uycakuyca nuni kaudip kalihalay, ni ka tayniyan nu mikuwanay ititaan, insyi' tu kutawa nu binawlan inayi' tu kulipahak nupising nu binacadan, canuut waca kuni ka udip, mahica nanaudip satu maudip atu i nayi' tu kulipahak nu balucu'. caaytu pakahemhem matenes inayay tu ku laliyasan nu balucu' canuut, pilalebu tu kapahay a balucu' kina bekahsatu mudateng, tu ama bakuhac ku kawaw, namakayni kulalangatan nu sakalawpes nu takubuwan, anu matinengay mudateng ku balucu' numu keliday tawyakaw, kucaaytu kalaheci kuni kuni pidebung nu hitay ititaan,kucaay aca kalawpes ku nyadu numitaa tu takubuwan, ahican nacasaw, nasepiyan tu kyai amuhida kunyadu' ita . caay pakasimsim ku baba lakinumitau sakidaya u duma satu u sapakayni i babalaki nu nyadu', anu umatinengsy ku balucu'mu dateng, tayni i nutawan anyadu' mihinang kacay, kama sauputu mueneng i kalalilaliwasak saan,kacika saupusa masanyadu' anu asanyadu'aytukaw kuuidahenay kukamu, kucaay tu kalawpes ku kamu nu binacadan makatukuh aida, i 58 a mihebcan yama tepatepaay aku isawali sa namakaynuyay amin i sakulsa satu namakasakulay amin, itini i E tulan na idaw henay kumi sanu saki8dayaay misakamu, ahican aca malaw pestu ku babalaki kyu sacaca cacay satu malawprs kukamu,mahida u simawan nu babalaki kyu kamuita miladay malawpes . tayniyay isawali a binacadan uni sausi nu babalaki ttu taniyay i sawali a binacadan sa, makaala tu tuluway a malebut ku tademaw, ahican aca u taniya nu binacadan i sawali, macenuun kuheni tunika adihan tu kawaw i takubuwan, masapisapinang kunipi patay nu huulam tubabalaki nu sakidaaya ahican caay kacenun kubalucu', kyu kasenun satu milaamel ttu itidaay a pancah, kyusa kasenun satu mananam tu itidaay, cakatenes malalapes tu kukamu. sakaalawpes nukamu u sakalawpes nu kamu nu babalaki, simsimen numita anu sabaw tu enem kumihcan mulaliu namakaluma'sa ,si wawa anusa kuhenisa pinna kumihcan, cayhen pakatukuh tu tusaay a bataan ku mihcan nuheni, uhatidaay amihcan siwawa anusa kasenun sa misanupancah kukamu, balaki kuwawa nuhenisa kasenusatu misanu pancahmuusakamu ku labu nuluma', kyu kasenun satu inayi' ku kamu nusakidaya a tademaw, mahin kyai kusaka lawpes nukamu nu sakidaya . uni kateka tepaan numaku itawya yami limelimekay tani isawaali a tademaw, yamatepaayaaku sakamusa, yu amma patapatay kubaki nidasa sakamu satu, iatakubuwan ku nyadu numita saan, nika caykatineng kami tu takubuwan hananay, saan ku kamunuheni mahicaay hakiya kunyadu' itid saan tu. ayda panahanay kumihcan ama ngalebtu kuniku subaadtu numita amaliyuliyuh tu kuheni i titaann u sakidaya, saicellangen ita mukilim tu mahedaway apetun numita. a mi saicelang tu kita mapulung haca malaliwaliwah tuwaca ku Sakizaya a binacadansa, ucaayay tu kataluma' u caayyaytu pakadateng tu binacadan kuheni, u hatiniyay tu kitamapulung, hanca cikapapina anu tahinahina acasa, u kapahay tu a wytasatu ku misaicelangay tu kakawaw, a u cima kuaidan tu kakawaw wyta tuwamin, anu mahicahica wyta tuwamin kasi tatungusay, ami saicrlang kita tu saakay tini i nyadu' ita tu sapalekal tu lalangawen, ahica ita mucuduh palekal, usasa ayawen numita ppalekal aicayi' kumamiida tukawaw u kakilimennumitaayda u maahedaway numitaa tu lalangawen atu lalikid udadiw nu babalaki, utuud aamin acaay pialeskita tu nadipa'an nu babalaki, nammuhica kkunni kaudip nuheni, anu namaka lalangawen akawaw acaay kita palemaang muwala tunutaw a nadipa'aan pa lamaku tunutaw, ukaakilimen numita u tatenga'y u namaka babakiyay kya u tatenga'ay, uni hedahedaw nu babalaki alahican ta hekal i cuwa a nyadu' malanutaw tu kaykaydahantu nutaw amala dadiu nuheni, umahiniyay a kaawwaw u sasa icelangen nu mitaaa muwala nnuka ahicaan numisu musakamu kya a palutatenga'kutau tunika tatenga' nukkawaw. u sanbansya a binacadan katukuh ayda ahebed ku baluccu' nuheni, pacici sa amala"pancah", palitan ku paynyanyadu'may , u i tibulay caay palutatenga' tunika u pancah nuheni, tada unamu dada' a nabalucuuu'an, makai i tamuwa palapanca tada nisakakuwaan namu amalapan cah, makayi' ku tadapancah paciciyan namukyu hange satu.
S.PHON: ikasumamadan ju ¶aajńß…ôn ka tajni ku mid…ôbuŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, tadaw mi sakakuwaj ku nikaudiip nu sakidaja, ńßan ¶a inaji Ē~ ° ku miku…ôanaj i totaan, u tumuk dada Ē~ ° ku tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu njadu Ē~ °, kapańß kuni kar~…ĺar~…ĺuuŇč nu binawr~…ĺan, inaji Ē~ ° kur~…ĺatusaj a tad…ômaw, mi t…ôŇčir~…ĺ amin tu kamu nu tumuk, ¶a ¶aj ku kamu nutumuuk ¶a ¶aj ku kawaw nu binawr~…ĺan, uj ¶akuj ¶a nuni kaudip kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, ni ka tajnijan nu mikuwanaj ititaan, insji Ē~ ° tu kutawa nu binawr~…ĺan inaji Ē~ ° tu kur~…ĺipańßak nupisiŇč nu bina ¶adan, ¶anuut wa ¶a kuni ka udip, mańßi ¶a nanaudip satu maudip atu i naji Ē~ ° tu kur~…ĺipańßak nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. ¶aajtu pakańß…ômńß…ôm mat…ôn…ôs inajaj tu ku r~…ĺar~…ĺijasan nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶anuut, pir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu kapańßaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° kina b…ôkańßsatu mudat…ôŇč, tu ama bakuńßa ¶ ku kawaw, namakajni kur~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčatan nu sakar~…ĺawp…ôs nu takubuwan, anu matin…ôŇčaj mudat…ôŇč ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° numu k…ôr~…ĺidaj tawjakaw, ku ¶aajtu kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i kuni kuni pid…ôbuŇč nu ńßitaj ititaan,ku ¶aaj a ¶a kar~…ĺawp…ôs ku njadu numitaa tu takubuwan, ańßi ¶an na ¶asaw, nas…ôpijan tu kjai amuńßida kunjadu Ē~ ° ita . ¶aaj pakasimsim ku baba r~…ĺakinumitau sakidaja u duma satu u sapakajni i babar~…ĺaki nu njadu Ē~ °, anu umatin…ôŇčsj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °mu dat…ôŇč, tajni i nutawan anjadu Ē~ ° mińßinaŇč ka ¶aj, kama sauputu mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak saan,ka ¶ika saupusa masanjadu Ē~ ° anu asanjadu Ē~ °ajtukaw kuuidańß…ônaj kukamu, ku ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺawp…ôs ku kamu nu bina ¶adan makatukuńß aida, i ** a mińß…ôb ¶an jama t…ôpat…ôpaaj aku isawar~…ĺi sa namakajnujaj amin i sakur~…ĺsa satu namakasakur~…ĺaj amin, itini i …ô tur~…ĺan na idaw ńß…ônaj kumi sanu saki*dajaaj misakamu, ańßi ¶an a ¶a mar~…ĺaw p…ôstu ku babar~…ĺaki kju sa ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj satu mar~…ĺawprs kukamu,mańßida u simawan nu babar~…ĺaki kju kamuita mir~…ĺadaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs . tajnijaj isawar~…ĺi a bina ¶adan uni sausi nu babar~…ĺaki ttu tanijaj i sawar~…ĺi a bina ¶adan sa, makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuwaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku tad…ômaw, ańßi ¶an a ¶a u tanija nu bina ¶adan i sawar~…ĺi, ma ¶…ônuun kuńß…ôni tunika adińßan tu kawaw i takubuwan, masapisapinaŇč kunipi pataj nu ńßuur~…ĺam tubabar~…ĺaki nu sakidaaja ańßi ¶an ¶aaj ka ¶…ônun kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, kju kas…ônun satu mir~…ĺaam…ôr~…ĺ ttu itidaaj a pan ¶ańß, kjusa kas…ônun satu mananam tu itidaaj, ¶akat…ôn…ôs mar~…ĺar~…ĺap…ôs tu kukamu. sakaar~…ĺawp…ôs nukamu u sakar~…ĺawp…ôs nu kamu nu babar~…ĺaki, simsim…ôn numita anu sabaw tu …ôn…ôm kumińß ¶an mur~…ĺar~…ĺiu namakar~…ĺuma Ē~ °sa ,si wawa anusa kuńß…ônisa pinna kumińß ¶an, ¶ajńß…ôn pakatukuńß tu tusaaj a bataan ku mińß ¶an nuńß…ôni, uńßatidaaj amińß ¶an siwawa anusa kas…ônun sa misanupan ¶ańß kukamu, bar~…ĺaki kuwawa nuńß…ônisa kas…ônusatu misanu pan ¶ańßmuusakamu ku r~…ĺabu nur~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kju kas…ônun satu inaji Ē~ ° ku kamu nusakidaja a tad…ômaw, mańßin kjai kusaka r~…ĺawp…ôs nukamu nu sakidaja . uni kat…ôka t…ôpaan numaku itawja jami r~…ĺim…ôr~…ĺim…ôkaj tani isawaar~…ĺi a tad…ômaw, jamat…ôpaajaaku sakamusa, ju amma patapataj kubaki nidasa sakamu satu, iatakubuwan ku njadu numita saan, nika ¶ajkatin…ôŇč kami tu takubuwan ńßananaj, saan ku kamunuńß…ôni mańßi ¶aaj ńßakija kunjadu Ē~ ° itid saan tu. ajda panańßanaj kumińß ¶an ama Ňčar~…ĺ…ôbtu kuniku subaadtu numita amar~…ĺijur~…ĺijuńß tu kuńß…ôni i titaann u sakidaja, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ita mukir~…ĺim tu mańß…ôdawaj ap…ôtun numita. a mi sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu kita mapur~…ĺuŇč ńßa ¶a mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß tuwa ¶a ku sakizaja a bina ¶adansa, u ¶aajaj tu katar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u ¶aajjajtu pakadat…ôŇč tu bina ¶adan kuńß…ôni, u ńßatinijaj tu kitamapur~…ĺuŇč, ńßan ¶a ¶ikapapina anu tańßinańßina a ¶asa, u kapańßaj tu a wjtasatu ku misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu kakawaw, a u ¶ima kuaidan tu kakawaw wjta tuwamin, anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a wjta tuwamin kasi tatuŇčusaj, ami sai ¶rr~…ĺaŇč kita tu saakaj tini i njadu Ē~ ° ita tu sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw…ôn, ańßi ¶a ita mu ¶uduńß par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, usasa ajaw…ôn numita ppar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ai ¶aji Ē~ ° kumamiida tukawaw u kakir~…ĺim…ônnumitaajda u maańß…ôdawaj numitaa tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw…ôn atu r~…ĺar~…ĺikid udadiw nu babar~…ĺaki, utuud aamin a ¶aaj piar~…ĺ…ôskita tu nadipa Ē~ °an nu babar~…ĺaki, nammuńßi ¶a kkunni kaudip nuńß…ôni, anu namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw…ôn akawaw a ¶aaj kita par~…ĺ…ômaaŇč muwar~…ĺa tunutaw a nadipa Ē~ °aan pa r~…ĺamaku tunutaw, ukaakir~…ĺim…ôn numita u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °j u namaka babakijaj kja u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj, uni ńß…ôdańß…ôdaw nu babar~…ĺaki ar~…ĺańßi ¶an ta ńß…ôkar~…ĺ i ¶uwa a njadu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺanutaw tu kajkajdańßantu nutaw amar~…ĺa dadiu nuńß…ôni, umańßinijaj a kaawwaw u sasa i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn nu mitaaa muwar~…ĺa nnuka ańßi ¶aan numisu musakamu kja a par~…ĺutat…ôŇča Ē~ °kutau tunika tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nukkawaw. u sanbansja a bina ¶adan katukuńß ajda ańß…ôb…ôd ku bar~…ĺu ¶ ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, pa ¶i ¶i sa amar~…ĺa"pan ¶ańß", par~…ĺitan ku pajnjanjadu Ē~ °maj , u i tibur~…ĺaj ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tunika u pan ¶ańß nuńß…ôni, tada unamu dada Ē~ ° a nabar~…ĺu ¶uuu Ē~ °an, makai i tamuwa par~…ĺapan ¶a tada nisakakuwaan namu amar~…ĺapan ¶ańß, makaji Ē~ ° ku tadapan ¶ańß pa ¶i ¶ijan namukju ńßaŇč…ô satu.
S.FORM: ikasumamadan yucaayhen ka tayni ku midebungay nu tademaw, tadaw mi sakakuway ku nikaudiip nu sakidaya, hanca inayi' ku mikueanay i totaan, u tumuk dada' ku tatengilan nu nyadu', kapah kuni kalaluung nu binawlan, inayi' kulatusay a tademaw, mi tengil amin tu kamu nu tumuk, cacay ku kamu nutumuuk cacay ku kawaw nu binawlan, uycakuyca nuni kaudip kalihalay, ni ka tayniyan nu mikuwanay ititaan, insyi' tu kutawa nu binawlan inayi' tu kulipahak nupising nu binacadan, canuut waca kuni ka udip, mahica nanaudip satu maudip atu i nayi' tu kulipahak nu balucu'. caaytu pakahemhem matenes inayay tu ku laliyasan nu balucu' canuut, pilalebu tu kapahay a balucu' kina bekahsatu mudateng, tu ama bakuhac ku kawaw, namakayni kulalangatan nu sakalawpes nu takubuwan, anu matinengay mudateng ku balucu' numu keliday tawyakaw, kucaaytu kalaheci kuni kuni pidebung nu hitay ititaan,kucaay aca kalawpes ku nyadu numitaa tu takubuwan, ahican nacasaw, nasepiyan tu kyai amuhida kunyadu' ita . caay pakasimsim ku baba lakinumitau sakidaya u duma satu u sapakayni i babalaki nu nyadu', anu umatinengsy ku balucu'mu dateng, tayni i nutawan anyadu' mihinang kacay, kama sauputu mueneng i kalalilaliwasak saan,kacika saupusa masanyadu' anu asanyadu'aytukaw kuuidahenay kukamu, kucaay tu kalawpes ku kamu nu binacadan makatukuh aida, i 58 a mihebcan yama tepatepaay aku isawali sa namakaynuyay amin i sakulsa satu namakasakulay amin, itini i E tulan na idaw henay kumi sanu saki8dayaay misakamu, ahican aca malaw pestu ku babalaki kyu sacaca cacay satu malawprs kukamu,mahida u simawan nu babalaki kyu kamuita miladay malawpes . tayniyay isawali a binacadan uni sausi nu babalaki ttu taniyay i sawali a binacadan sa, makaala tu tuluway a malebut ku tademaw, ahican aca u taniya nu binacadan i sawali, macenuun kuheni tunika adihan tu kawaw i takubuwan, masapisapinang kunipi patay nu huulam tubabalaki nu sakidaaya ahican caay kacenun kubalucu', kyu kasenun satu milaamel ttu itidaay a pancah, kyusa kasenun satu mananam tu itidaay, cakatenes malalapes tu kukamu. sakaalawpes nukamu u sakalawpes nu kamu nu babalaki, simsimen numita anu sabaw tu enem kumihcan mulaliu namakaluma'sa ,si wawa anusa kuhenisa pinna kumihcan, cayhen pakatukuh tu tusaay a bataan ku mihcan nuheni, uhatidaay amihcan siwawa anusa kasenun sa misanupancah kukamu, balaki kuwawa nuhenisa kasenusatu misanu pancahmuusakamu ku labu nuluma', kyu kasenun satu inayi' ku kamu nusakidaya a tademaw, mahin kyai kusaka lawpes nukamu nu sakidaya . uni kateka tepaan numaku itawya yami limelimekay tani isawaali a tademaw, yamatepaayaaku sakamusa, yu amma patapatay kubaki nidasa sakamu satu, iatakubuwan ku nyadu numita saan, nika caykatineng kami tu takubuwan hananay, saan ku kamunuheni mahicaay hakiya kunyadu' itid saan tu. ayda panahanay kumihcan ama ngalebtu kuniku subaadtu numita amaliyuliyuh tu kuheni i titaann u sakidaya, saicellangen ita mukilim tu mahedaway apetun numita. a mi saicelang tu kita mapulung haca malaliwaliwah tuwaca ku Sakizaya a binacadansa, ucaayay tu kataluma' u caayyaytu pakadateng tu binacadan kuheni, u hatiniyay tu kitamapulung, hanca cikapapina anu tahinahina acasa, u kapahay tu a wytasatu ku misaicelangay tu kakawaw, a u cima kuaidan tu kakawaw wyta tuwamin, anu mahicahica wyta tuwamin kasi tatungusay, ami saicrlang kita tu saakay tini i nyadu' ita tu sapalekal tu lalangawen, ahica ita mucuduh palekal, usasa ayawen numita ppalekal aicayi' kumamiida tukawaw u kakilimennumitaayda u maahedaway numitaa tu lalangawen atu lalikid udadiw nu babalaki, utuud aamin acaay pialeskita tu nadipa'an nu babalaki, nammuhica kkunni kaudip nuheni, anu namaka lalangawen akawaw acaay kita palemaang muwala tunutaw a nadipa'aan pa lamaku tunutaw, ukaakilimen numita u tatenga'y u namaka babakiyay kya u tatenga'ay, uni hedahedaw nu babalaki alahican ta hekal i cuwa a nyadu' malanutaw tu kaykaydahantu nutaw amala dadiu nuheni, umahiniyay a kaawwaw u sasa icelangen nu mitaaa muwala nnuka ahicaan numisu musakamu kya a palutatenga'kutau tunika tatenga' nukkawaw. u sanbansya a binacadan katukuh ayda ahebed ku baluccu' nuheni, pacici sa amala"pancah", palitan ku paynyanyadu'may , u i tibulay caay palutatenga' tunika u pancah nuheni, tada unamu dada' a nabalucuuu'an, makai i tamuwa palapanca tada nisakakuwaan namu amalapan cah, makayi' ku tadapancah paciciyan namukyu hange satu.

kar~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak saan,ka ¶ika saupusa masanjadu Ē~ ° anu asanjadu Ē~ °ajtukaw kuuidańß…ônaj kukamu, ku ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺawp…ôs ku kamu nu bina ¶adan makatukuńß aida, i ** a mińß…ôb ¶an jama t…ôpat…ôpaaj aku isawar~…ĺi sa namakajnujaj amin i sakur~…ĺsa satu namakasakur~…ĺaj amin, itini i …ô tur~…ĺan na idaw ńß…ônaj kumi sanu saki*dajaaj misakamu, ańßi ¶an a ¶a mar~…ĺaw p…ôstu ku babar~…ĺaki kju sa ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj satu mar~…ĺawprs kukamu,mańßida u simawan nu babar~…ĺaki kju kamuita mir~…ĺadaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs . tajnijaj isawar~…ĺi a bina ¶adan uni sausi nu babar~…ĺaki ttu tanijaj i sawar~…ĺi a bina ¶adan sa, makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuwaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku tad…ômaw, ańßi ¶an a ¶a u tanija nu bina ¶adan i sawar~…ĺi, ma ¶…ônuun kuńß…ôni tunika adińßan tu kawaw i takubuwan, masapisapinaŇč kunipi pataj nu ńßuur~…ĺam tubabar~…ĺaki nu sakidaaja ańßi ¶an ¶aaj ka ¶…ônun kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, kju kas…ônun satu mir~…ĺaam…ôr~…ĺ ttu itidaaj a pan ¶ańß, kjusa kas…ônun satu mananam tu itidaaj, ¶akat…ôn…ôs mar~…ĺar~…ĺap…ôs tu kukamu. sakaar~…ĺawp…ôs nukamu u sakar~…ĺawp…ôs nu kamu nu babar~…ĺaki, simsim…ôn numita anu sabaw tu …ôn…ôm kumińß ¶an mur~…ĺar~…ĺiu namakar~…ĺuma Ē~ °sa ,si wawa anusa kuńß…ônisa pinna kumińß ¶an, ¶ajńß…ôn pakatukuńß tu tusaaj a bataan ku mińß ¶an nuńß…ôni, uńßatidaaj amińß ¶an siwawa anusa kas…ônun sa misanupan ¶ańß kukamu, bar~…ĺaki kuwawa nuńß…ônisa kas…ônusatu misanu pan ¶ańßmuusakamu ku r~…ĺabu nur~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kju kas…ônun satu inaji Ē~ ° ku kamu nusakidaja a tad…ômaw, mańßin kjai kusaka r~…ĺawp…ôs nukamu nu sakidaja . uni kat…ôka t…ôpaan numaku itawja jami r~…ĺim…ôr~…ĺim…ôkaj tani isawaar~…ĺi a tad…ômaw, jamat…ôpaajaaku sakamusa, ju amma patapataj kubaki nidasa sakamu satu, iatakubuwan ku njadu numita saan, nika ¶ajkatin…ôŇč kami tu takubuwan ńßananaj, saan ku kamunuńß…ôni mańßi ¶aaj ńßakija kunjadu Ē~ ° itid saan tu. ajda panańßanaj kumińß ¶an ama Ňčar~…ĺ…ôbtu kuniku subaadtu numita amar~…ĺijur~…ĺijuńß tu kuńß…ôni i titaann u sakidaja, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ita mukir~…ĺim tu mańß…ôdawaj ap…ôtun numita. a mi sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu kita mapur~…ĺuŇč ńßa ¶a mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß tuwa ¶a ku sakizaja a bina ¶adansa, u ¶aajaj tu katar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u ¶aajjajtu pakadat…ôŇč tu bina ¶adan kuńß…ôni, u ńßatinijaj tu kitamapur~…ĺuŇč, ńßan ¶a ¶ikapapina anu tańßinańßina a ¶asa, u kapańßaj tu a wjtasatu ku misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu kakawaw, a u ¶ima kuaidan tu kakawaw wjta tuwamin, anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a wjta tuwamin kasi tatuŇčusaj, ami sai ¶rr~…ĺaŇč kita tu saakaj tini i njadu Ē~ ° ita tu sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw…ôn, ańßi ¶a ita mu ¶uduńß par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, usasa ajaw…ôn numita ppar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ai ¶aji Ē~ ° kumamiida tukawaw u kakir~…ĺim…ônnumitaajda u maańß…ôdawaj numitaa tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw…ôn atu r~…ĺar~…ĺikid udadiw nu babar~…ĺaki, utuud aamin a ¶aaj piar~…ĺ…ôskita tu nadipa Ē~ °an nu babar~…ĺaki, nammuńßi ¶a kkunni kaudip nuńß…ôni, anu namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw…ôn akawaw a ¶aaj kita par~…ĺ…ômaaŇč muwar~…ĺa tunutaw a nadipa Ē~ °aan pa r~…ĺamaku tunutaw, ukaakir~…ĺim…ôn numita u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °j u namaka babakijaj kja u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj, uni ńß…ôdańß…ôdaw nu babar~…ĺaki ar~…ĺańßi ¶an ta ńß…ôkar~…ĺ i ¶uwa a njadu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺanutaw tu kajkajdańßantu nutaw amar~…ĺa dadiu nuńß…ôni, umańßinijaj a kaawwaw u sasa i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn nu mitaaa muwar~…ĺa nnuka ańßi ¶aan numisu musakamu kja a par~…ĺutat…ôŇča Ē~ °kutau tunika tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nukkawaw. u sanbansja a bina ¶adan katukuńß ajda ańß…ôb…ôd ku bar~…ĺu ¶ ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, pa ¶i ¶i sa amar~…ĺa"pan ¶ańß", par~…ĺitan ku pajnjanjadu Ē~ °maj , u i tibur~…ĺaj ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tunika u pan ¶ańß nuńß…ôni, tada unamu dada Ē~ ° a nabar~…ĺu ¶uuu Ē~ °an, makai i tamuwa par~…ĺapan ¶a tada nisakakuwaan namu amar~…ĺapan ¶ańß, makaji Ē~ ° ku tadapan ¶ańß pa ¶i ¶ijan namukju ńßaŇč…ô satu.
